Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_DISCOUNT
Opcode.Doc: This opcode cancels the discount instances associated with the /account object or /service object specified in the input flist. This opcode is also called by PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_DEAL to cancel each product associated with a specific deal.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object action was applied to

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object action was applied to. It is NULL if the discount being cancelled is associated with an account level deal.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object - session in which event took place - null means none

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Event description - free text for application to describe event

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Timestamp of when event started (Portal Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Timestamp of when event ended (Portal Time). This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DISCOUNTS
Array.Doc: Discounts Array - array of discounts to cancel. It uniquely identifies the discount in an account.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OFFERING_OBJ
Poid.Doc: The purchased discount to be cancelled.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Array of results information. Since only one event object is created by this call, only one element will be returned. The element-id is not significant. Fields of the event object are added with the ClassRef. Additional fields are added to the return flist here. If thePCM_OPFLG_READ_RESULT flag is set for the operation, all the fields in the event object are returned on the output flist, not just the poid. If the PCM_OPFLG_CALC_ONLY flag is set, no fields in the database are changed and the event object is not actually created, but the fields that would have been used to create the event object are returned to the caller on the output flist.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
